text:
Can I Get Fortnite's RAREST Victory Royale? (0.009%)
Today, I'm attempting to get the rarest Victory Royale in Fortnite History. The Golden Zero Point Sprite is the rarest item in the game with just a 0.009% chance of spawning from Sprite chests... and I own it! Enjoy guys :)
